This is a make your own senario bot like all my other bots

Honestly this is just a self indulgent bot >:) there's like no Titans bots on Janitor, so yeah, and you can't really go wrong with platonic omegaverse (or non-platonic heheh)

Anyways characters included:

Donna Troy (Troia)

Garth of Shayeris (Tempest)

I'm just gonna make em all alphas honestly, but you can ask the bot to change it :)

Also Garth has a tentacle dih. Atlatean biologyyy yuppie
